kpis.title: Target Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, CAST("target_rate" AS DOUBLE) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Request Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("requests_sent", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Response Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("responses_received", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Bytes Received Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("bytes_rx", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Bytes Sent Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("bytes_tx", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Response Latency
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("response_latency:buckets",
                  LAG("response_latency:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.9), (0.99), (0.999), (0.9999)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: GET Latency
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("get_latency:buckets",
                  LAG("get_latency:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.9), (0.99), (0.999), (0.9999)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: SET Latency
kpis.sql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT timestamp,
         h2_delta("set_latency:buckets",
                  LAG("set_latency:buckets") OVER (ORDER BY timestamp)) AS d
  FROM {{view}}
)
SELECT timestamp::DOUBLE/1e9 AS t,
       q::VARCHAR AS quantile,
       h2_quantile(d, q, {{p}})::DOUBLE AS v
FROM d, (VALUES (0.5), (0.9), (0.99), (0.999), (0.9999)) qs(q)
WHERE d IS NOT NULL

kpis.title: Request Error Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("request_errors", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Connection Failure Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("connections_failed", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cache Hit Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("cache_hits", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: Cache Miss Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("cache_misses", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: GET Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("get_count", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t

kpis.title: SET Rate
kpis.sql: SELECT CAST(timestamp / 1e9 AS DOUBLE) AS t, irate_1s("set_count", timestamp) AS v FROM {{view}} ORDER BY t
